meta.source: Generated from jordandixit/design-system components.json plus inferred implementation rules.
meta.warning: Mappings below should be checked against the exact Figma visuals and tokens.json before production merge.

constraints: disabled overrides hovered, pressed, and focused
isOpen must not be true when state=disabled

notes: Interactive components must support visible focus.
Disabled controls must not receive pointer or keyboard activation.
